targets.queryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT as_of_date_local AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT price_data_as_of_utc AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT price_data_as_of_utc AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(as_of_date_local)) * 24, 1) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(as_of_date_local)) * 24, 1) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(SUBSTR(price_data_as_of_utc, 1, 10))) * 24, 1) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(SUBSTR(price_data_as_of_utc, 1, 10))) * 24, 1) AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT coverage_derived_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT coverage_derived_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT coverage_missing_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT coverage_missing_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT coverage_filled_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT coverage_filled_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT coverage_missing_count AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT coverage_missing_count AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT holdings_count AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio);
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT holdings_count AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_portfolio);

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND last_price > 0;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND last_price > 0;

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND (last_price IS NULL OR last_price = 0);
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND (last_price IS NULL OR last_price = 0);

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, coverage_derived_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, coverage_derived_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-90 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

panels.title: Holdings with Stale or Missing Prices

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, last_price, ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(as_of_date_local)) AS INTEGER) AS days_old FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND (last_price IS NULL OR last_price = 0) ORDER BY symbol;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, last_price, ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(as_of_date_local)) AS INTEGER) AS days_old FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND (last_price IS NULL OR last_price = 0) ORDER BY symbol;
